subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen doth on this Day enjoin upon all the chosen ones of God that which beseemeth them in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی امروز جمیع اصفیای حق را بما ینبغی لهم فیهذا الیوم امر میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
